mapper.sql: SELECT (${rn_top} / (${rn_top} - ${rn_bottom})) AS pageNo , (${rn_top} - ${rn_bottom}) AS pageSize , totalCount - (rowindx - 1) AS rrowindx , ROW_.* FROM (

SELECT SBUM.USER_ID userId , SAUM.AUTH_ID userAuth , SBUM.USER_PSWD userPswd , SBUM.USER_KOR_NM userKorNm , SBUM.USER_ENG_NM userEngNm , SBUM.MOBILE_NO mobileNo , SBUM.EMAIL_ADDR emailAddr , SBUM.LST_LOGIN_DT lstLoginDt , SBUM.LST_PSWD_CHG_DT lstPswdChgDt , SBUM.AUTH_AREA_CD authAreaCd , SBUM.SNS_SE_CD snsSeCd , SBUM.SNS_ACCOUNT snsAccount , SBUM.INTG_YN intgYn , SBUM.ZIP_NO zipNo , SBUM.HOME_ADDR homeAddr , SBUM.HOME_ADDR_DTLS homeAddrDtls , SBUM.BLON_NM blonNm , SBUM.FAX_NO faxNo , SBUM.INLN_NO inlnNo , SBUM.JGRP_CD jgrpCd , SBUM.JRNK_CD jrnkCd , SBUM.REG_DIV_CD regDivCd , SBUM.USE_YN useYn , SBUM.PSWD_FAIL_CNT pswdFailCnt , SBUM.IS_DEL_ABLE isDelAble , SBUM.BRK_YN brkYn , SBUM.BRK_COMMENT brkComment FROM STB_B_USER_MNG SBUM LEFT JOIN STB_M_AUTH_USER_MNG SAUM ON SBUM.USER_ID = SAUM.USER_ID WHERE SBUM.USER_ID = #{userId}
mapper.update: /* on.standard.system.user.updateUserPswdFailCount */ UPDATE STB_B_USER_MNG SET PSWD_FAIL_CNT = PSWD_FAIL_CNT + 1 , BRK_YN = CASE WHEN (SELECT LGIN_FAIL_LMT_CNT from STB_B_SYSTEM_POLICY_MNG) = PSWD_FAIL_CNT + 1 THEN 'Y' ELSE BRK_YN END , BRK_COMMENT = CASE WHEN (SELECT LGIN_FAIL_LMT_CNT from STB_B_SYSTEM_POLICY_MNG) = PSWD_FAIL_CNT + 1 THEN CONCAT(BRK_COMMENT , ', 비밀번호 실패건수 초과로 인한 계정잠김 ') ELSE BRK_COMMENT END WHERE USER_ID = #{userId}
mapper.insert: /* on.standard.system.user.insUserLoginHist */ INSERT INTO STB_H_USER_LOGIN_LOG (USER_ID , AUTH_AREA_CD , USER_AUTH_CD ,REMOTE_ADDR , LOGIN_DIV_CD , LOGIN_COMMENT ) VALUES (#{userId}, #{authAreaCd}, #{userAuthIdListStr},#{remoteAddr}, #{loginDivCd}, #{loginCommnet} )
mapper.sql:
SELECT A.rownum_ rowindx , B.TOTAL_COUNT totalCount , A.USER_ID userId , A.USER_KOR_NM userKorNm , A.USER_ENG_NM userEngNm , A.BLON_NM blonNm , A.LST_LOGIN_DT lstLoginDt , A.MOBILE_NO mobileNo , A.EMAIL_ADDR emailAddr , A.AUTH_ID authId , A.AUTH_NM authNm , A.REG_DATE regDate , A.BRK_YN brkYn , A.BRK_YN_NM brkYnNm , A.USE_YN useYn , A.USE_YN_NM useYnNm FROM ( SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY SBUM.REG_DATE ASC) AS rownum_ , SBUM.USER_ID , SBUM.USER_KOR_NM , SBUM.USER_ENG_NM , SBUM.BLON_NM , DATE_FORMAT(SBUM.LST_LOGIN_DT, '%Y.%m.%d %H:%i') LST_LOGIN_DT , SBUM.MOBILE_NO , SBUM.EMAIL_ADDR , SAUM.AUTH_ID , (SELECT AUTH_KOR_NAME FROM STB_B_AUTH_MNG WHERE AUTH_ID = SAUM.AUTH_ID) AUTH_NM , DATE_FORMAT(SBUM.REG_DATE, '%Y.%m.%d %H:%i') REG_DATE , SBUM.BRK_YN , CASE WHEN SBUM.BRK_YN = 'Y' THEN '차단' ELSE '미차단' END AS BRK_YN_NM , SBUM.USE_YN , CASE WHEN SBUM.USE_YN = 'Y' THEN '사용' ELSE '미사용' END AS USE_YN_NM FROM STB_B_USER_MNG SBUM LEFT JOIN STB_M_AUTH_USER_MNG SAUM ON SBUM.USER_ID = SAUM.USER_ID WHERE 1 = 1
AND SBUM.USER_ID LIKE CONCAT('%',#{searchKeyWord},'%')
AND ( SBUM.USER_KOR_NM LIKE CONCAT('%',#{searchKeyWord},'%') OR SBUM.USER_ENG_NM LIKE CONCAT('%',#{searchKeyWord},'%') )
AND SBUM.MOBILE_NO LIKE CONCAT('%',#{searchKeyWord},'%')
AND ( SBUM.USER_ID LIKE CONCAT('%',#{searchKeyWord},'%') OR ( SBUM.USER_KOR_NM LIKE CONCAT('%',#{searchKeyWord},'%') OR SBUM.USER_ENG_NM LIKE CONCAT('%',#{searchKeyWord},'%') ) OR MOBILE_NO LIKE CONCAT('%',#{searchKeyWord},'%') )
ORDER BY SBUM.REG_DATE ASC ) A JOIN ( SELECT COUNT(*) TOTAL_COUNT FROM STB_B_USER_MNG WHERE 1 = 1
AND USER_ID LIKE CONCAT('%',#{searchKeyWord},'%')
AND ( USER_KOR_NM LIKE CONCAT('%',#{searchKeyWord},'%') OR USER_ENG_NM LIKE CONCAT('%',#{searchKeyWord},'%') )
AND MOBILE_NO LIKE CONCAT('%',#{searchKeyWord},'%')
AND ( USER_ID LIKE CONCAT('%',#{searchKeyWord},'%') OR ( USER_KOR_NM LIKE CONCAT('%',#{searchKeyWord},'%') OR USER_ENG_NM LIKE CONCAT('%',#{searchKeyWord},'%') ) OR MOBILE_NO LIKE CONCAT('%',#{searchKeyWord},'%') )
) B ON 1 = 1
mapper.insert: /* on.standard.system.user.insertUserMng */ INSERT INTO STB_B_USER_MNG ( USER_ID, USER_PSWD, USER_KOR_NM, USER_ENG_NM, MOBILE_NO, EMAIL_ADDR, LST_LOGIN_DT, LST_PSWD_CHG_DT , ZIP_NO, HOME_ADDR, HOME_ADDR_DTLS, BLON_NM , FAX_NO , JGRP_CD, JRNK_CD, REG_DIV_CD ) VALUES(#{userId}, #{userPswd}, #{userKorNm}, #{userEngNm}, #{mobileNo}, #{emailAddr} , NOW() , NOW() ,#{zipNo} , #{homeAddr}, #{homeAddrDtls} , #{blonNm}, #{faxNo} , #{jgrpCd}, #{jrnkCd} , #{regDivCd} )
/* on.standard.system.user.insertAuthUserMng */ INSERT INTO STB_M_AUTH_USER_MNG (AUTH_ID , USER_ID , USE_YN) VALUES ( #{userAuth}, #{userId}, 'Y' )
